programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan and Jack eavesdrop on Blakey's medical - and completely misinterpret its findings. Comedy, starring Reg Varney, Bob Grant and Stephen Lewis

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Mum wins a holiday for two in sunny Spain, so Stan, Olive and Arthur compete to do the chores in the hope that she will invite them to accompany her. Comedy, starring Reg Varney and Doris Hare

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Faye tells Craig there's no way she's letting him quit his job for her and it's best they finish. Emma assumes Alina made a move on Lucas. Seb tries out a goth look, but Abi assures him that Nina likes him for who he is

programme.title: Mutiny on the Buses (1972)
programme.desc: Chirpy bus driver Stan Butler lands himself in trouble as he struggles to raise enough money to marry his girlfriend, and on top of training his unemployed brother-in-law for a job at the depot he has to contend with an officious new manager. Comedy based on the sitcom, starring Reg Varney, Stephen Lewis, Bob Grant, Michael Robbins, Anna Karen and Doris Hare

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Newlyweds Mike and Ellie decide to build their dream home at a beauty spot called Gypsy's Acre, ignoring the warnings of elusive romany Mrs Lee about an ancient curse supposedly cast upon the land. The couple settle into their new life, but the mysterious woman makes her presence felt, subjecting them to a campaign of hatred in an attempt to force them out. Tragedy soon strikes, but as luck would have it Miss Marple is staying nearby with her recently widowed old friend Mrs Phillpot. However, if the spinster sleuth is to solve the puzzle, she must put her own life in grave danger. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with Wendy Craig, Glynis Barber, Hugh Dennis, Tamzin Outhwaite, Tom Hughes, Joanna Vanderham, Aneurin Barnard, William Hope and Janet Henfrey

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part one of two. While holidaying in Cornwall with his friend Captain Hastings, the sleuth meets a local woman who has seemingly become unaccountably accident-prone - but soon starts to suspect she is actually a victim of foul play. David Suchet and Hugh Fraser star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Belgian sleuth's Cornish holiday comes to a dramatic conclusion as he unravels the mystery behind the series of disastrous near-misses that placed the life of a beautiful heiress in danger, and as the truth comes to light, a secret engagement is revealed. David Suchet stars, with Philip Jackson and Hugh Fraser

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: When a man's charred remains are found after an explosion, Foyle's investigations lead him to a top secret intelligence organisation. With murder and deception rife among its members, the race is on to find out the truth, but the detective's discoveries threaten his future career. Wartime drama, starring Michael Kitchen with guests Angela Thorne, Ronald Pickup and Samuel West

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian detective is summoned to a hotel by a mysterious veiled lady who tells him that her forthcoming marriage is under threat because she is being blackmailed over a love letter. Drama, starring David Suchet and Frances Barber

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A mischievous trickster finally gets his comeuppance when his body is found floating below the weir in Midsomer Deverell. The extent of his double life starts to emerge when three family friends and a long-lost niece produce wills claiming his fortune, and his collection of erotic photographs from the 1960s gives Barnaby and Jones the key to the tangled relationships and feuds blighting the family

programme.title: The Suspicions of Mr Whicher
programme.desc: Whicher is hired by his one-time political master, former home secretary Edward Shore, to investigate threats made against his son Charles, who has recently returned to London from India with his young family. Shore fears entanglement in a scandal could have devastating repercussions for his career and insists the detective carry out the investigation without involving his former Met colleagues, even after a murder occurs. Whicher's pursuit of justice takes him to the most dangerous corners of the Docklands, but also brings him into contact with a woman who starts to melt his long-frozen heart. Victorian crime drama, starring Paddy Considine, with Nicholas Jones, John Heffernan and Tim Pigott-Smith

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective is faced with a difficult case when he investigates the discovery of a body in a well, and he also has to contend with a new boss, Chief Superintendent Moody, who is dubious as to Lewis' motivation for coming out of retirement. As investigations into the human remains in the well proceed, an avant-garde artist's body is also discovered and at first glance it looks like a tragic drugs overdose, but Hathaway and Lewis quickly recognise the tell tale signs of murder

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A pregnant junior doctor is found beaten to death in a hospital car park, and her boyfriend Joe Nash becomes the prime suspect when he cannot provide an alibi. Brooks and Devlin begin to think Nash is having an affair with his therapist, but what initially seems like a crime of passion unravels into a conspiracy involving senior government officials, with Steel and Phillips risking their careers to find the truth. Bradley Walsh, Jamie Bamber and Matthew McNulty star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid informs Jean he has been given a temporary promotion at work, but she soon begins to doubt what he says. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: With Arthur having been gone for six months, Stan accompanies his sister Olive to the divorce courts. Reg Varney and Anna Karen star

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Stan is having difficulty supporting the whole family on his meagre earnings. Comedy, starring Reg Varney

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rishi is excited about his birthday, Tracy is disappointed, leaving Nate guilty, and Vinny is guilt wracked

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: Foyle responds to complaints of sabotage at an RAF burns hospital and uncovers adultery and murder within the medical unit. As the hunt for the guilty party intensifies, the detective discovers his son Andrew could be a suspect and is shocked when he hears he has been reported missing from his barracks. Wartime crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen, John Wood, Honeysuckle Weeks and Julian Ovenden

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A farmer's murder and the crash landing of an enemy plane lead Foyle to investigate the activities of a group of land girls, and the detective begins to suspect the captured German airmen have something to hide. Stella Gonet and James Wilby guest star in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A crackdown on an organised crime racket leads Foyle and Milner to a shipyard owned by the Talbot brothers, a duo with dubious links to a communist agitator who has recently moved to the area. When an engineer is murdered just hours after working at the shipyard, the detectives desperately try to track down the killer and discover the truth surrounding the Talbots' shady business dealings. Peter Capaldi guest stars in the wartime drama, with Michael Kitchen, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Two grieving widows lay rival claims to a corpse found washed up on the beach, each insisting it is the body of her missing husband. While it is obvious only one can be telling the truth, the detective finds it tricky to discern which of the women is lying - and why. Drama, guest starring Eleanor Bron, with Jack Shepherd

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: The mysterious disappearance of a sheep farmer leads Wycliffe into the heart of a rural community whose apparently tranquil surface conceals a desperate struggle for survival. It is not long before he uncovers disturbing evidence suggesting foul play. Drama, starring Jack Shepherd, Helen Masters and Jimmy Yuill

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: A mysterious fire that killed an artist with links to political activists leaves the police baffled, while Bright finds himself short-staffed when a stomach bug puts most of his men on sick leave. The situation becomes more serious when a housewife dies of the same condition. Endeavour investigates a family-run supermarket, believing the infection may have stemmed from their stock being deliberately contaminated, and discovers dark secrets that may have a connection to the unexplained blaze

programme.title: The Queen's Green Planet
programme.desc: Documentary following Her Majesty the Queen and an ambitious legacy project to create a global network of protected forests, spanning the 53 countries of the Commonwealth. The film also features a conversation between the Queen and Sir David Attenborough in the gardens of Buckingham Palace last summer, with the subjects ranging from climate change to conkers and birthday gifts. There is also footage of the members of the royal family involved so far in making the Queen's Commonwealth Canopy a reality, including Prince Harry planting trees in the Caribbean and Prince William in Canada's Great Bear Rainforest

programme.title: Inside the Crown: Secrets of the Royals
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the royals' rollercoaster relationship with the press, beginning with the Queen's 1953-1954 Commonwealth tour, when cameramen worked hand-in-hand with the palace. A few years later, newspaper owner Lord Altrincham was attacked for daring to publish criticisms of the Queen, but by the mid-1970s Princess Margaret's hedonistic lifestyle was the subject of increasing press attention. But that was only the beginning. In the 1990s, the press has a field day over the breakdown of Charles and Diana's marriage, feeding on royal scandals

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama starring Brenda Blethyn. The detective investigates a fire that rips through a holiday park on the Northumberland coast, destroying three cabins. A young woman's body is discovered and the resort's owner, Jim Viner, fears the victim is his sister Deena when he returns from a weekend away with his daughter Clare. With Jim's suspicions confirmed, a police report then reveals Clare's boyfriend Ryan and his friends had been partying near the scene hours before the blaze started, but where are they now, and where is Deena's best friend Sally? Co-starring Kenny Doughty, Cush Jumbo and Jon Morrison

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: A girl asks Robin to help safeguard an ancient treasure cared for by her father, who has foreseen his own death and wishes to appoint a successor while there is still time. Cathryn Harrison and Cyril Cusack guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur sees an opportunity to cash in when a footballer with a drink and gambling habit goes missing, but selling his story to the paper is not as easy as it seems when there is more than one person interested in his whereabouts. Comedy drama, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at double glazing at a UPVC recycling plant, the ancient art of milling for a Welsh Bara Brith, Sheffield steel for Olympic ice skates and a craftsman making banjos

programme.desc: Rishi Persad and the team are at Sandown Park for the final day of the jumps season

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited
programme.desc: Brian Moore presents action from December 1979, including Manchester United v Arsenal, Crystal Palace v Middlesbrough and Brighton & Hove Albion v Manchester City

programme.title: Euro 2020 Preview Show
programme.desc: A look at France and Poland's teams, plus profiles of Leonardo Bonucci, Sergio Ramos and Gabor Kiraly

programme.title: ITV Sport Stories
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke presents highlights from the ITV Sport archive, including the inside story of the 1993 Grand National that never was. Plus, how New Zealand's rugby rallying cry the Haka was reinvented, and sprinter Linford Christie opens up about his failed drugs test at the 1988 Olympic Games

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The famous sleuth investigates the mysterious death of Sir Charles Baskerville - is it due to a curse that stalks the family, or simply the work of a human murderer?

programme.title: Jeremiah Johnson (1972)
programme.desc: A former soldier living a solitary life in the Rocky Mountains is persuaded by US Army troops to help them find a stranded wagon train. He reluctantly guides the soldiers across a sacred burial ground, an action that violates a tribal taboo and will lead to tragedy in his life. Western, starring Robert Redford, Stefan Gierasch and Will Geer

programme.title: Monster Carp

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Exasperated at the Sheriff's record in office, King John visits Sherwood to personally oversee the destruction of Robin and his outlaw band - a task he entrusts to the ruthless Roger de Carnac. Phil Davis and Matt Frewer guest star

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates a twisted tale of rock 'n' roll, meditation and murder. Anna Carteret and Trevor Bannister guest star, with Roger Moore

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: The duo investigate when Harriet's father is the victim of a cunning burglar who sneaks in undetected and steals a priceless jade collection. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are assigned to protect Cowley's former girlfriend, now a controversial evangelist, from an assassin, but are unaware that the would-be hitman is right under their nose. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur and Terry are hired by two farmers to transport a prize bull, little suspecting they are actually being tricked into stealing it. When their error of judgement become apparent, the duo try to redeem themselves by working out a way to get the animal back. George Cole and Dennis Waterman star

programme.title: Monster Carp
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi, Tom Dove and Neil Spooner head to Italy and travel to a lake in the hills near Bologna, where they have just two days to catch a whopper. Then it is off for the main event at a large water called Viverone, not far from the Alps, where they go up against fish with a reputation for outwitting anglers

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as celebrity contestants Hannah Mills, Chris Ramsey, Dion Dublin and Lesley Garrett pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: The team is given two days and a $20,000 budget to remove a 10-metre steel-hulled yacht from Cockburn Beach in Western Australia. The problem is the boat is buried deep in the sand and is a danger to beach goers. Heavy machinery specialist Ryan is going to use his monster excavator to try and get the job done, but there's a catch - to make the budget work, Luke needs Ryan to be done and dusted in 24 hours.

programme.title: Bullitt (1968)
programme.desc: A tough police detective is assigned to protect a Mob witness for 48 hours, only for hitmen to find their hiding place and try to silence the informant. The rebellious cop realises something does not add up and goes in search of both the killers and whoever told them where to locate their target - but an ambitious politician wants him off the case. Thriller, starring Steve McQueen, Jacqueline Bisset, Robert Vaughn and Robert Duvall

programme.desc: Hitman Robert Rath is planning to quit his lethal profession, especially when he is stalked by a ruthless younger assassin who has no qualms about killing innocent bystanders. programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: The LAPD finds itself on the hunt for a thief from a local jewellery heist. Even though the case may look fairly pedestrian from the outset, Riggs and Murtaugh soon get a reminder that all that glitters is not gold and suddenly this straightforward looking case begins to evolve into something deeper. Murtaugh is erroneously called 'grandpa' by another parent while at the playground, sending him into a spiral of insecurity. Riggs battles some serious demons after vowing to withdraw from his drinking habit and work on his sobriety. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

programme.desc: A girl asks Robin to help safeguard an ancient treasure cared for by her father, who has foreseen his own death and wishes to appoint a successor while there is still time. Cathryn Harrison and Cyril Cusack guest star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur sees an opportunity to cash in when a footballer with a drink and gambling habit goes missing, but selling his story to the paper is not as easy as it seems when there is more than one person interested in his whereabouts. Comedy drama, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Made in Britain
programme.desc: A look at double glazing at a UPVC recycling plant, the ancient art of milling for a Welsh Bara Brith, Sheffield steel for Olympic ice skates and a craftsman making banjos

programme.title: ITV Racing: The Opening Show

programme.title: The Big Match Revisited

programme.title: Euro 2020 Preview Show
programme.desc: A look at France and Poland's teams, plus profiles of Leonardo Bonucci, Sergio Ramos and Gabor Kiraly

programme.title: ITV Sport Stories
programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke presents highlights from the ITV Sport archive, including the inside story of the 1993 Grand National that never was. Plus, how New Zealand's rugby rallying cry the Haka was reinvented, and sprinter Linford Christie opens up about his failed drugs test at the 1988 Olympic Games

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The famous sleuth investigates the mysterious death of Sir Charles Baskerville - is it due to a curse that stalks the family, or simply the work of a human murderer?

programme.title: Jeremiah Johnson (1972)
programme.desc: A former soldier living a solitary life in the Rocky Mountains is persuaded by US Army troops to help them find a stranded wagon train. He reluctantly guides the soldiers across a sacred burial ground, an action that violates a tribal taboo and will lead to tragedy in his life. Western, starring Robert Redford, Stefan Gierasch and Will Geer

Finally, Mel and Tony host with a menu filled with traditional British classics in a bid to win the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef visits beachside restaurant Barefoot Bob's in Hull, Massachusetts, owned by husband-and-wife team Marc and Lisa. Every year profits nosedive through the bleak winter months, and matters aren't improved when it becomes clear they have both lost their passion - not only for the business but also for each other. With the restaurant and marriage on the line, Gordon tries to help turn things around before it's too late

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Vets Emily and Will need to relocate two cheetahs to spread blood lines. Volunteer Debbie is put to the test as nine orphaned baby monkeys arrive at Riverside Rehabilitation Centre

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Farmer's daughter Mandy Sowray and her friend Anny Harrison host first at Laskill Country House in Helmsley, North Yorkshire. Chris Witton and Saroop Ram from the Swan Hotel feel right at home, but tech-savvy Colin and Ben Warburg from Scalford Hall Hotel fail to connect from the start. During the afternoon's hay-bale race, youngsters Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker from the Abbey Hotel fail to stack up to the challenge. At dinner, Mandy bigs up her banger qualifications, but at breakfast she fails to crack Chris's order. Colin's feedback leaves unanswered questions for Mandy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Chris Witton and his spiritual friend Rammy hope that straightforward value for money will win them the competition, as they host at the Swan Hotel in Telford. A Yorkshire pudding-making competition leaves confident cooks Mandy and Anny thinking there's more to youngsters Charlie and Lauren than meets the eye. At dinner, Rammy opens up about his troubled past. Colin has a rude awakening in the morning. At feedback time, Chris has a change of heart about some of his guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Colin Warburg and his student son Ben hope that their 81-room country pile - Scalford Hall Hotel in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire - will wow their rivals. However, Chris and Rammy are still smarting from their feedback and think that Colin is playing games. After an afternoon crate stacking competition on the hotel's high wire course, Colin gets a grilling at dinner. A lukewarm reaction to breakfast only adds to Colin's woes and when he sees his feedback he suspects that retribution is at hand

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit is to the Abbey Hotel in Battle, East Sussex, run by confident young colleagues Charlie Thompson and Lauren Tucker. However when Charlie and Lauren's guests arrive, Colin and Ben feel the squeeze and Chris and Rammy find themselves in a sticky situation. On an afternoon at the archery range, scores are settled. At dinner, straight-talking Chris can't help but be impressed, but when the conversation turns to parking, the guests are in a jam with their hosts. Later, Colin's feedback leaves Lauren wanting answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet up to settle some scores. Laskill Country House host Mandy wants to crack where she went wrong with breakfast and why Colin and Ben failed to connect with her, while Chris and Rammy from The Swan Hotel wish to question Lauren on her room flaws and get to the bottom of Colin's bedroom nightmares

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer catch up home owners they have previously met on the programme to see how they have got on since they helped them make their decisions. In this episode, Phil catches up with Kathleen and Tom who chose to renovate their three-bedroom Victorian terrace in Gosforth, Newcastle

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: After a four year stint living in New Zealand, ex-RAF pilot Jon and GP Gill Flewers want to build a Kiwi-style hill house on the slopes of the Malvern hills in Worcestershire. They plan to build an ambitious three-storey home clad in wood and stone, but the pair encounter problems as the site is so steep builders do not want to take on the job

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: VE Day in Colour: Britain's Biggest Party
programme.desc: Using newly recorded accounts and previously unseen archive, this is the story of the day in May 1945 when the fighting finally stopped across Europe and the celebrations began as Britain rejoiced in unity. The stories of ordinary folk are heard, but alongside the happy tales of street parties, fancy dress, and jelly and ice cream are the reflections of those thinking of loved ones who wouldn't return to enjoy a peace that was hard won

programme.title: The Great British Spitfire Restoration
programme.desc: Documentary following a team of engineers as they work to restore a 1943 Spitfire to its former glory. Led by a factory owner and operating out of a little-known workshop on one of Britain's most important wartime airbases, the dedicated enthusiasts spend a year getting the iconic aircraft into condition to take to the skies once again. Narrated by Al Murray

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes (2017)
programme.desc: A devastating conflict erupts between humans and intelligent primates in a post-apocalyptic future. The leader of the apes is determined to make peace and prove his people are not savages - but a tragic course of events leaves him wrestling with a desire for revenge. Sci-fi adventure sequel, the conclusion of the trilogy of prequels to the 1968 movie. Starring Andy Serkis, Woody Harrelson and Steve Zahn

programme.title: Fantastic Four (2015)
programme.desc: A gifted young scientist joins a secret project researching inter-dimensional travel, and they return from a journey to another world having been granted superhuman powers. Their abilities make them the only hope for Earth's survival when a colleague who was lost on their expedition returns to wreak vengeance. Superhero adventure, starring Miles Teller, Michael B Jordan, Kate Mara and Jamie Bell

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three of the most difficult cases he has taken on since the series began. First, he returns to Cafe Hon in Baltimore, Maryland, where owner Denise Whiting was trapped in a nasty battle with the community and had threatened the locals with lawsuits. Next, the chef goes back to Chiarella's in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. When he first visited owners Tommy and Dina DeFino, the business was struggling so badly that Tommy had completely lost his confidence and wife Dina had lost her patience. On his final stop, Gordon travels to Leone's in Montclair, New Jersey, where Rose Leone was depending on her lazy son Michael to run the restaurant

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Fergus discovers that Ste is strapped for cash and makes him an offer. Meanwhile, Martine confronts Felix about whether he wants to be with her

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: A couple from Bristol, and a couple from Wollaston start off with £100,000 and must avoid wrong answers or bundles of their cash will fall through trapdoors

programme.title: Coach Trip
programme.desc: The group heads to Florence, where two tourists become competitive at a sculpting class before everyone gets very messy at a pizza kitchen and there is a surprise yellow card

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enlists the help of seamstress Lisa Comfort to help Amber and Colin create a memory quilt. However, Amber's lack of ironing skills could result in disaster

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike grows concerned about how Molly is spending her leisure time between novels, and tries to push her into becoming the perfect home-maker. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike grows concerned about how Molly is spending her leisure time between novels, and tries to push her into becoming the perfect home-maker. Comedy, starring Billy Gardell

programme.title: Mike & Molly
programme.desc: Mike brings home a stray puppy for the weekend, but when Molly has difficulty bonding with the pooch, she begins to doubt her maternal skills. Comedy, starring Melissa McCarthy

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part one of two. Doug takes Carrie on a romantic weekend break, but she grows increasingly jealous when his new, slimmer physique draws admiring glances from passers-by. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny are left to look after Arthur and the house - but find themselves arguing over the tiniest problems

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part two of two. Doug and Carrie end up lost in remote woodlands, ruining their romantic weekend. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Giovanna Fletcher discusses the breast cancer charity CoppaFeel. Rose Matafeo talks about her stand-up special, Horndog. Tom Jones chats about his tour. Parminder Nagra talks about the TV drama Intergalactic. Robert James-Collier has the latest on the new series of Ackley Bridge. Olly Alexander from Years & Years chats and performs in the studio

programme.title: A Taste of Italy
programme.desc: Nisha Katona visits Lucca in Tuscany, where she tries a soup containing 20 vegetables and the traditional dish of mixed meat ravioli with meat ragu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa learns she is good at crossword puzzles and enters a city-wide contest. Homer opens a break-up service after discovering he has a flair for letting loved ones down, but gets himself into trouble with his daughter when he places a bet against her in the competition

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart begins attending a Catholic school and meets a hip-hop-quoting priest who encourages him to convert. Homer tries to return his son to the Protestant Church, but the lure of beer and a pancake dinner causes him to change his faith - so Reverend Lovejoy and Ned Flanders take action. With the guest voice of Liam Neeson

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: More of the most memorable moments from the past five years, including one of the zoo's most enduring love stories at Penguin Island. At 22, Rudd is the oldest penguin on the island and has been with his partner Spike for more than 15 years. Meanwhile, Silvery gibbon Alvin is keen to get close to his partner Tilu again, but ever since they had a baby together, young Eko has proven a bit of a passion killer

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb (2014)
programme.desc: Nightwatchman Larry notices that the living exhibits of his museum are behaving strangely. He discovers that the magical artefact that brings them to life is damaged, so he and his friends travel to London's Natural History Museum to find a way to restore it. Fantasy comedy sequel, starring Ben Stiller, Rebel Wilson and Robin Williams in his final film role

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle (2017)
programme.desc: Four teenagers play a jungle-themed game on an old console, only to find themselves transported into the game and transformed into its heroic characters. They must embark on a death-defying journey through the game's wilderness setting to make it back to the real world, or be stuck as video game characters forever. Fantasy action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson, Karen Gillan, Kevin Hart and Jack Black

programme.title: Guy Martin's Battle of Britain
programme.desc: Part two of two. Guy's training ramps up at the UK's only aerial combat school, where he must master dogfighting at 200mph, handling extreme g-force, and flying upside down. He enlists the help of the Parachute Regiment for a unique experiment demonstrating the firepower of Second World War aircraft machine guns, before being allowed behind the joystick of the world's only two-seater Hawker Hurricane to face a Messerschmitt 109 in the skies over Kent

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on recently aired shows, including watching Game of Talents, Line of Duty, Catfish UK: The TV Show, Four in a Bed, Paranormal Activity and Cher & the Loneliest Elephant. Plus, they share their observations of the coverage of the funeral of HRH the Duke of Edinburgh and Good Morning Britain's report of an altercation between Labour leader Keir Starmer and a pub landlord

programme.title: Everest (2015)
programme.desc: Two expeditions set out to climb to the summit of the world's highest mountain. Both parties of mountaineers get caught in one of the fiercest snowstorms ever recorded, and face a desperate struggle to survive against the elements. Director Baltasar Kormakur's adventure based on a 1996 expeditition, and co-written by Simon Beaufoy (The Full Monty). The all-star cast includes Jason Clarke, Josh Brolin, Jake Gyllenhaal and Keira Knightley

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, where he meets a stubborn owner who doesn't react well to criticism. Tom bought the restaurant for his daughter Andrea, but six years later he's still refusing to let her run it. Can the chef break Tom's iron grip on the business and persuade him to change his outdated approach?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the cash prize in Marbella. Finally it's Caz and Dave's turn to host with their Jewish-inspired family menu, but which pair will secure the £1,000 prize for best-staged soiree remains to be seen

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Kayla and Fizza forge a friendship with a new boy who enrols in their class, ruffling feathers throughout the school. Also joining Year 11 is Kaneez's nephew from Manchester. Martin experiences a baptism of fire as acting head teacher, and Kayla finds herself at the centre of a cruel prank that goes viral across the school

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: An offended Johnny walks out after the gypsies are wrongly blamed for stealing from the school. Martin has problems at home but needs to make things right

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Fizza goes off the rails when her mother protests against sex education at the school, and when she accompanies her sister to Johnny's site, it all ends in tears

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Tahir's tall stories catch up with him when his plan to help Sam backfires disastrously. Kayla decides to keep a secret from Fizza, who has received bad news about her mother. Martin discovers that Johnny has a talent and makes him an offer

programme.title: Ackley Bridge
programme.desc: Sparks fly between Fizza and Kayla when the truth comes out about the deleted text. Tahir grabs an opportunity at the talent show and Johnny and Fizza are brought closer together. Mandy has some news and Zainab reveals her true agenda to Kaneez

programme.title: The £100k Drop
programme.desc: A mother and daughter from Cheshire and a father and son from York take part in the quiz in which they lose prize money with each wrong answer. Hosted by Davina McCall

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley present the words-and-numbers game, with Nicki Chapman joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff's pedantic know-it-all attitude finally gets him into trouble with another patron and it is not long before his bravery is called into question. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and John Ratzenberger

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach acquires an antique weighing machine that also gives out fortunes - which start coming true in eerie fashion - but Diane brushes off the predictions as coincidence, until she is forced to revise her opinion

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra grudgingly agrees to let Ray have more involvement in the daily decision-making process, giving him the freedom to shop for grocery items he likes and choose where the family will go on holiday. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and Amy get trapped at Frank and Marie's house during a snowstorm, but they actually find themselves having a good time - until an unguarded comment alters the mood. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers the leader of local group the Frontier Girls is intending to sell a record number of cookies in his area, and sets out to beat her at her own game. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Amy Aquino

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: KACL staff compete against a rival station in a weight-loss challenge. Frasier refuses to participate, but Roz offers herself as part of the prize. Meanwhile, Niles struggles to cope with the sleepless nights caused by an unusual symptom of Daphne's pregnancy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Maris is released on bail and placed under house arrest, only to embroil an unwitting Niles in a madcap scheme to flee the country. Meanwhile, Frasier is forced to take care of Roz's insurance agent Ann. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Julia Sweeney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Cranes take a trip to the mountains for a holiday away from the city, but Frasier, Niles and Daphne are plagued by nightmares during the overnight journey. Martin also has a strange dream, but unlike the rest of the family, continues to sleep soundly

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three Cardiff couples compete to win £1,000 by throwing the perfect dinner part. First-time hosts Abi and Jake plan an American-themed menu. Their home-made fare impresses most of their guests, and their special effort for vegan couple Ashleigh and Jack is really appreciated. On night two, passionate vegans Ashleigh and Jack serve a fully plant-based menu designed to satisfy even the most committed meat eaters, but their rivals aren't convinced that they can be converted. On the final night, Karen and James are confident a more traditional menu will show the 'youngsters' how it's done

programme.desc: Nick Hewer and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game in which contestants pit their wits against the clock. Chris Packham is in Dictionary Corner with Susie Dent

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Road Trip

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Baby Surgeons: Delivering Miracles
programme.desc: Doctors perform extraordinary surgery on babies still inside the womb, to save lives before they are born. This episode focuses on three expectant mothers navigating complex pregnancies. Becky's unborn baby has a rare lung tumour that is growing rapidly, Ann-Marie is carrying identical twins, one of which has selective growth restriction jeopardising both baby's chances of surviving, and Randika's dwarfism makes giving birth a difficult proposition

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the rising incidence of theft in Northamptonshire, where in 2018 burglaries hit a five-year high. PC Ben Norris is dispatched to apprehend a suspected burglar who then carries out a rooftop protest

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a man who has had a seizure, but they are warned by the control room that the patient has a history of being abusive toward ambulance crews. In Bromsgrove, a paramedic team treat a man who has been coughing up blood and complaining of a loss of sensation in one leg. He may have a blood clot on his lungs which could stop him breathing

programme.title: Paramedics: Britain's Lifesavers
programme.desc: Documentary following West Midlands Ambulance Service at the peak of the Covid-19 pandemic in April 2020, from the perspective of the crews, control room staff and managers as they deal with the human cost of the biggest ever challenge to the service. To get more ambulances onto the frontline, managers deploy student paramedics, with 21-year-old Sam and 20-year-old Caitlyn encountering patients with breathing difficulties, in care homes, and with mental health issues that appear isolation-related

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Beaver, Pennsylvania, where he meets a brother-and-sister team who find it almost impossible to work together. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: The actor goes on rail journeys around the globe, jumping on and off trains to find adventure and face challenges, while exploring the history and culture of each place he visits

programme.desc: A new apprentice to an eccentric vet in the Yorkshire Dales quickly discovers life in the country is not as idyllic as he thought. programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan and her campervan Helen arrive on home turf, touring the breath-taking southern Highlands of Scotland on a 140-mile trek from Glasgow to Aberfoyle. At Loch Lomond, the comedian takes to a kayak and hits the water to get a unique view of the amazing local scenery. She visits the spectacular Falls of Dochart, where she gets special access to the stunningly beautiful island of Inchbuie. She also views a bizarre Iron Age-style dwelling, known as a crannog, erected on stilts in Loch Tay

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: Clive decides to introduce a sheepdog puppy to the flock for the first time, and Miles and Sidney take on more responsibilities on the farm while Reuben is busy working full time at his apprenticeship. Disappointed to miss the renowned annual Muker Fell race, Clive and Amanda decide to host their very own competition on home turf, across three miles of Ravenseat's toughest moorland

programme.title: Inside the World's Greatest Hotels
programme.desc: Day-to-day life in Caesars Palace, a hotel themed on ancient Rome and containing numerous restaurants and casinos, which has been the heart and soul of Las Vegas for more than 50 years. Cameras follow the staff who keep make this 4,000-room hotel running 24 hours a day, go behind scenes of a high roller's secret luxury villa and reveal how the needs of 3,000 people are catered for per day. Plus, the secrets of the casino floor are revealed as a young couple tie the knot Vegas-style

programme.title: Edward VII: The Merry Monarch
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the king's life and reign, looking at the relationships with the women in his life and considering the remarkable period in history he presided over - an era when the arts, culture, technology and architecture flourished in Britain

programme.title: Britain's Favourite Comedy

Charlie Higson reveals which memorable Fast Show sketch Paul Whitehouse hated, while the cast of Goodness Gracious Me recall their famous Going for an English sketch

programme.title: Paddy McGuinness: Saturday Night Live
programme.desc: Best known as the host of Take Me Out, Paddy McGuinness rose to fame playing the doorman in Peter Kay's hit Channel 4 comedy Phoenix Nights and its spin-off Max and Paddy's Road to Nowhere. This is a recording of his performance at Manchester Arena during his 2011 UK tour, a show filled with his fast-paced humour and anecdotes, with Paddy injecting a party atmosphere as he holds forth on topics including strip clubs, stag dos and hen nights and invites people from the audience to take part in a version of his ITV dating show

programme.title: Eight Days That Made Rome
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes looks at the day in 49BC that Julius Caesar led his army across the River Rubicon. By doing so he ignored the orders of the Roman Senate, and effectively declared war on his rivals in Rome. In time, it would prove a fatal blow to the Republic - the system of elected officials that had governed for nearly half a millennium. Hughes analyses Caesar's character and reveals how new theories about his health shed light on his decision-making, while archeological finds recently dredged from a Dutch river reveal the true genocidal horror of his conquest of Gaul. Dramatisations featuring Jack Ellis, Nathan Dean Williams and Bashar Rahal bring the key moments to life

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow charts the life of Greek artist Domenicos Theotocopolous, dubbed El Greco, one of the most distinctive painters of the 16th century. His work was considered to be ahead of its time - so much so that it was all but ignored for 300 years. El Greco developed a highly individualistic style that eventually proved enormously influential, paving the way for the Baroque and providing the inspiration for 20th-century expressionism

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Teorin and Collette had high hopes when they let out their five-bedroom family home, but it wasn't long before their tenant stopped paying rent - and then turned the house into a hostel for holiday-makers. Quickly running out of options, the couple turn to eviction specialist Chris Sharpe for help. Plus, Harrow council officers discover 40 people crammed into a potential deathtrap of a house, and a woman who relies on her rent for medical expenses tries to claw back some from her tenant

programme.title: Kate Humble's Coastal Britain
programme.desc: The naturalist walks 12 miles of Suffolk's shingle coast, starting at Minsmere Nature Reserve, and later heads through the protected wetlands at Snape Maltings in a kayak. Her final destination is the 10-mile-long shingle spit at Orford Ness, a former military test site which is now a National Trust nature reserve

programme.title: Dambusters: A Daring Plan
programme.desc: Dan Snow examines the famous 1943 bombing raid to destroy German dams, looking at the recruitment and training of the airmen for the mission, with Commander Guy Gibson given just eight weeks to put together a crew able to fly at low altitudes at night. He also explores the development of the bouncing bomb by Barnes Wallace, and the raid itself

programme.title: Caravanning with Shane Richie
programme.desc: The former Pontins bluecoat heads to North Devon to stay in a static caravan on a park owned by of one of the biggest holiday park chains in the UK. The park boasts its own entertainment centre, swimming pool, nature reserve and even its own private beach. He is later joined by one of his oldest friends who, just like him, is a former holiday park entertainer. Peter joins Shane on a visit to a theme park with a difference, and the duo attend a D-Day re-enactment at a local beach, complete with vintage jeeps and aircraft

programme.title: Gibraltar: Britain in the Sun
programme.desc: Documentary following life in the British Overseas Territory, which sits at the entrance to the Mediterranean. The first edition features Dr Eric Shaw, who is in charge of looking after Gibraltar's Barbary macaques, while police officer Dylan Quigley has a few complications with an arrest after breaking up a fight. Australian couple Ken and Chrissie fly in for their dream wedding, but things don't go according to schedule and wedding planner Monica Coumbe has just minutes to save their big day from disaster

programme.title: Eight Days That Made Rome
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes focuses on the day in 32BC when Octavian stole the secret will of his most dangerous political rival, Mark Antony. It is a moment that casts a light on what it took to win in Roman politics, as the cunning, brilliant subterfuge required paved Octavian's path to power by undermining Antony's popularity and giving Octavian the crucial support of Rome's Senate and people in the civil war that followed. Dramatisations featuring Jack Morris, Nathan Dean Williams and Taniel Yusef bring the key moments to life

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of 17th-century artist Peter Paul Rubens, who enjoyed an active and eventful career. He was regarded as the chief exponent of the Baroque style, merging the grace of the Italian High Renaissance with the realism and landscapes of the northern tradition, and was perhaps best known for painting voluptuous female nudes within large-scale mythological allegories

programme.desc: Doctors in the accident and emergency department treat a patient in cardiac arrest. Junior doctor George Kay leads the resus team, while Hannah Ryan steps in to head up the nurses. programme.title: Eight Days That Made Rome
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes focuses on the day when Roman troops earned the undying hatred of a fierce and fearless queen who led a revolt that came perilously close to ending the Roman occupation of Britannia. Around 60AD troops invaded Boudica's settlement, flogged her and raped her daughters. The outrage provoked the Iceni queen to lead a revolt that came perilously close to ending the Roman occupation of Britannia. Dramatisations featuring Aislinn Sands, Ross O'Hennessy and Nicholas Lopez bring the key moments to life

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow explores the life and work of ground-breaking artist Diego de Silva y Velazquez, whose paintings provide an insight into the development of the Spanish monarchy in the 17th century - and the decline of the most powerful royal court in Europe

programme.title: Baggage Claim (2013)
programme.desc: An air hostess is horrified at the thought of her younger sister getting married while she is still single. She realises her job gives her access to eligible men from across America, and begins clocking up thousands of air miles as she scours the country for a potential fiance. Romantic comedy, with Paula Patton and Taye Diggs

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: Billion Dollar Brain (1967)
programme.desc: Former secret agent Harry Palmer comes out of retirement to take a mysterious canister to Finland, and ends up embroiled in an American megalomaniac's bid to take over the world. Espionage thriller, directed by Ken Russell and starring Michael Caine, Oscar Homolka and Karl Malden

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin (2017)
programme.desc: Biopic of children's author AA Milne, focusing on how his relationship with his son influenced the creation of the Winnie the Pooh stories. The books prove immensely popular in a nation recovering from the trauma of the First World War, but bring the youngster who inspired them uncomfortably into the public eye. Starring Domhnall Gleeson, Margot Robbie and Kelly Macdonald

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection (2016)
programme.desc: Hitman Arthur Bishop's arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his new girlfriend Gina and blackmails him into committing three assassinations in as many days, while making them look like accidents. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Jessica Alba, Sam Hazeldine and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: The Ritual (2017)
programme.desc: A group of college friends reunite for a hiking trip in Sweden. When one of them is injured, they are forced to make a risky detour through a forest during a rainstorm, which leads them into the clutches of a menacing presence stalking the woods. Horror based on Adam Nevill's novel, starring Rafe Spall and Robert James-Collier

programme.title: The Descent (2005)
programme.desc: A woman recovering from a personal tragedy joins a group of friends on a caving expedition. However, their adventure takes a horrific turn when they find themselves trapped in an unexplored cavern, where savage creatures are lurking in the shadows. Horror from Dog Soldiers director Neil Marshall, starring Shauna Macdonald, Natalie Mendoza, Alex Reid and Nora-Jane Noone

programme.title: The Choice (2016)
programme.desc: Two neighbours find themselves overwhelmingly attracted to each other, and make substantial changes in their lives to be together - one breaking off a long-term relationship and the other conquering his fear of commitment. Over the next 10 years, their feelings for each other are tested by a series of challenges. Romantic drama based on Nicholas Sparks' novel, starring Benjamin Walker and Teresa Palmer

programme.title: Time Bandits (1981)
programme.desc: A bemused schoolboy is escorted on a bizarre journey through time by a group of larcenous dwarfs. His adventures lead him to encounters with various characters from history - but none of them are quite what he had imagined. Terry Gilliam's fantasy comedy, starring Craig Warnock, David Rappaport, John Cleese, Michael Palin, Sean Connery, Ian Holm, Ralph Richardson and David Warner

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: The Abyss (1989)
programme.desc: An American nuclear submarine is sunk after a collision with a mysterious object, and the US government asks oil workers to help with the rescue. However, when they and a Navy Seal team arrive at the location of the vessel, a series of strange incidents leads to an encounter with aliens living in the depths. James Cameron's sci-fi thriller, starring Ed Harris, Michael Biehn and Mary Elizabeth Mastrantonio

programme.title: Shooter (2007)
programme.desc: A former Marine sniper is coaxed back into action when government officials need his help to prevent an assassination attempt on the US president. However, the intended target is in fact an African archbishop, and the marksman is set up by double-crossing agents to take the fall, forcing him to go on the run as he fights to clear his name. Action thriller, with Mark Wahlberg, Michael Pena and Danny Glover

programme.title: Heat (1995)
programme.desc: An armoured car hold-up sets a veteran police detective on the trail of a highly intelligent career criminal, whom he is obsessed with capturing. Meanwhile, the robber is planning an elaborate bank heist as his final job before retiring, and a complex game of cat and mouse develops between the two. Michael Mann's crime thriller, starring Al Pacino, Robert De Niro, Val Kilmer, Jon Voight, Tom Sizemore and Natalie Portman

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: A series of half hour programmes aimed at reflecting the interests, needs and aspirations of the sign language community (SL)

programme.title: Hondo (1953)
programme.desc: A hard-boiled cavalry scout with a feral dog as companion stumbles across a woman and her child stranded on their homestead deep inside hostile territory. Despite repeated attacks by the Apaches, they refuse to leave their home, leaving the scout with no choice but to stay and defend her. Western, starring John Wayne, Geraldine Page, Ward Bond and Michael Pate

programme.title: The Far Country (1954)
programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

programme.title: Appointment with Danger (1950)
programme.desc: A nun is targeted by two murderers when they realise she is the only witness to one of their killings, and it is up to postal inspector to protect her and bring the men to justice. Noir thriller, starring Phyllis Calvert, Alan Ladd and Paul Stewart

programme.title: The Duel at Silver Creek (1952)
programme.desc: A gambler goes after the gang of claim jumpers who killed his father, and joins forces with an injured marshal who also wants the criminals brought to justice. However, their partnership is tested when a devious femme fatale enters their lives. Don Siegel's Western, starring Audie Murphy, Stephen McNally and Faith Domergue

programme.title: The Martian (2015)
programme.desc: A manned mission to Mars is abruptly abandoned, with one crew member left for dead. However, the astronaut has survived and faces a series of challenges - to contact Earth and arrange his rescue and to survive for the years it will take for a spacecraft to reach him on resources intended to last the crew a month. Ridley Scott's sci-fi drama based on the novel by Andy Weir, starring Matt Damon, Jessica Chastain, Kristen Wiig and Chiwetel Ejiofor

programme.title: Independence Day: Resurgence (2016)
programme.desc: Two decades have passed since Earth was saved from an extraterrestrial invasion, and in the years since, the aliens' salvaged technology has been used to transform the world. However, it may not be enough to save the human race when a second, even deadlier attack begins. Sci-fi adventure, starring Jeff Goldblum, Liam Hemsworth and Bill Pullman

programme.title: Ray & Liz (2018)
programme.desc: A couple living near Birmingham raise their two sons while living on the fringes of society, breaking social taboos as they deal with issues beyond their control. Director Richard Billingham's award winning drama inspired by his upbringing in a council flat, and the impact of his parents' relationship on his life. Starring Richard Ashton, Justin Salinger and Ella Smith

programme.title: Scribe (2016)
programme.desc: A recovering alcoholic finds himself at the centre of a political conspiracy after he accepts a shady job transcribing calls from tapped phones. Thriller, starring Francois Cluzet, Denis Podalydes and Sami Bouajila. In French

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Miles and Julius are both smitten with new girl Inga, while Ollie, Gareth and Fred invite Sophie's new partner Tom Zanetti out fishing, and Emily Blackwell arrives in the Cotswolds

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Amy Sutherland refuses to accept help from anyone when it comes to raising her and Justin's four young children, so Jo Frost tries to assist the exhausted couple

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Comedians Alan Carr and Aisling Bea, Paralympian Kadeena Cox, and actress and author Teri Hatcher compete in the final programme of culinary challenges. Judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith set the celebrities some tough tasks, beginning with a muffin signature, followed by a test of their pie-making abilities for the technical, and then a showstopper cake challenge that may see dreams may turn to nightmares. These brave celebrities are all baring their bakes to raise money for Stand Up To Cancer - and to encourage viewers to do the same

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Howard and his fellow astronauts sit in the space shuttle awaiting launch, he reflects on the tumultuous events of the previous few days, when he and Bernadette tried to get married. Meanwhile, his friends witness the blast-off on TV at home

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Despite being on the International Space Station, Howard gets caught in a strange argument between Bernadette and his mother via video link. Elsewhere, Raj feels lonely while his best friend is away and ends up interfering with Sheldon's and Leonard's dates. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tells the girls she is unsure about her relationship with Leonard and is considering breaking up with him, but when Sheldon finds out, he tries his best to change her mind. Meanwhile, on the International Space Station, Howard is being bullied by the other astronauts. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant, but when she becomes interested in Leonard, Penny decides to mark her territory by sleeping with him. Meanwhile, Howard starts to lose his mind when his return from space is delayed another week. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard returns from his space mission, but the welcome from his friends and family does not meet his expectations. His night alone with Bernadette goes badly, his mother ignores him, and he realises Stuart has taken his place as Raj's best friend. On top of that, Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny kick him out of their group games night. Comedy, starring Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's grandmother, known as Meemaw, arrives in Pasadena to visit, but his excitement at her arrival quickly gives way to discomfort when she clashes with Amy. Meanwhile, Raj finds himself drawn to an ambitious female screenwriter he meets at the comic-book store, but Bernadette angrily reminds him he already has a girlfriend. Comedy, guest starring June Squibb

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy host a Valentine's Day episode of Fun with Flags, while Leonard and Penny grapple with getting older. Elsewhere, Howard and Bernadette discover a surprise in their hot tub, and Raj is torn between Emily and a girl he met at the comic book store. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the friends find out about Bernadette's big news, they celebrate by getting together for an evening of karaoke. However, Bernadette is upset when Howard freaks out over her announcement as he becomes convinced that he needs to start earning more money. Comedy, Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 200th episode of the comedy, the gang finally celebrates Sheldon's birthday after more than nine years together, with the help of a few special guests. Starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with guest appearances from Adam West, Wil Wheaton and Stephen Hawking

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Howard face problems when they file for a patent for their infinite persistence gyroscope. Plus, Penny, Amy and Bernadette give Raj dating advice when Emily reaches out to him after their breakup. Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is shocked at a revelation from Sheldon after she buys him a new laptop, while Raj sells out Leonard and Howard after they lie to their wives in order to attend an early screening of a movie. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Grease (1978)
programme.desc: Rebellious American teenager Danny falls for innocent Australian girl Sandy during the summer holidays, but when he later finds out she is a new student at his school, he risks losing her love by trying to act cool in front of his friends. Romantic musical set in the 1950s, starring John Travolta, Olivia Newton-John, Stockard Channing, Jeff Conaway, Didi Conn and Sid Caesar

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Famous faces inlcuding Shaun Ryder and Bez, Rylan Clark-Neal and his mother Linda, Denise Van Outen and her boyfriend Eddie Boxshall, and Oti Mabuse and her sisters Motsi and Phemelo give their opinions on This Morning, Killing Eve, Extreme Tribe: The Last Pygmies, Taken, The Chase, 8 Days: To the Moon and Back, and Serengeti

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated viewers the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, and Amira and Iqra look back on the year's biggest and best shows, including Strictly Come Dancing, Countdown, This Morning, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, CBeebies Bedtime Stories, The Undoing, First Dates, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Elephant, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown and Naked Attraction

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share more of their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the biggest and best shows, including Our Planet, This Morning, Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, Blind Date, and 24 Hours in Police Custody

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons Jack and Kim, who both enjoy the high life, arrive at the restaurant, while East Ender Terry and hairdresser Levana share a funny and unforgettable date, as they muse on Towie and the merits of keeping an emergency bottle of wine in your wardrobe. Plus, 47-year-old Maria meets 49-year-old pilot and fellow divorcee Paul

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Receptionist Kirsty has high expectations for her date with Oliver and wastes no time in telling him that she wants marriage and kids very soon. DJ Tom struggles with confidence away from his decks and is matched with classics student Olivia, who has never had a date before

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated viewers the Siddiquis, Giles and Mary, Jenny and Lee, Ellie and Izzi, Mary and Marina, and Amira and Iqra look back on the year's biggest and best shows, including Strictly Come Dancing, Countdown, This Morning, Yorkshire Tea vs PG Tips: Battle of the Brews, Nigella's Cook, Eat, Repeat, CBeebies Bedtime Stories, The Undoing, First Dates, Borat Subsequent Moviefilm, Jamie: Keep Cooking and Carry On, Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?, Elephant, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown and Naked Attraction

However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.desc: Jo Frost helps a family with six fiercely independent children to bring some order to their lives, in particular, helping the older kids to deal with the death of their father

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Amy Sutherland refuses to accept help from anyone when it comes to raising her and Justin's four young children, so Jo Frost tries to assist the exhausted couple

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. In order to save the struggling Italian restaurant from disaster, he must persuade harassed owner Julie to co-operate with the head chef, and work his magic on a menu that relies heavily on a microwave

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: Lego Masters USA
programme.desc: The second challenge takes the contestants on an out-of-this-world odyssey, as each team of two must create a space-themed build

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Stuart hosts a Halloween party at the comic-book store, and Howard talks incessantly about his work on board the International Space Station, annoying his wife and friends. Penny and Leonard have a steamy encounter at the lab. Guest starring real-life astronaut Buzz Aldrin

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon upsets guest star Stephen Hawking when they play an online game of Words with Friends, until Howard advises him to let the scientist win. Elsewhere, Penny enrols in a college class, but decides to keep it a secret from Leonard. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Amy and Wil Wheaton get into a fight while filming Fun with Flags, Sheldon suffers the consequences of their fall-out. He ends up going to Penny for advice and after getting drunk, confronts the actor in a bid to make him apologise. Bernadette encourages Howard to move out of his mother's house

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends try to solve the mystery of Sheldon's post-lunch activities, following him to a secret room where they discover how he chills out. Elsewhere, Leonard is jealous when Penny starts texting a classmate, but things quickly change when Alex gets flirty with him

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tries to get Sheldon into the Christmas mood by playing a game, but things do not go as planned when Sheldon reveals a childhood trauma. Raj goes out with the girls and reveals he had crushes on both Penny and Bernadette - but not Amy. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: Batwoman
programme.desc: Alice has a devious new plan to get the attention of both Gotham and Safiyah. With Kate still missing and the city in revolt, Luke and Mary are desperate to find a stand-in, so Ryan dons the suit again and comes face-to-face with Alice for the first time. Meanwhile, Sophie and Kane try to uncover who may have had a vendetta against Kate.

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Charlotte Ritchie, Jamali Maddix, Lee Mack, Mike Wozniak and Sarah Kendall continue their quest to curry favour with omnipotent Taskmaster Greg Davies. Jamali decorates the caravan, Sarah is appalled by a kiwi fruit and, under severe pressure, Mike delivers a revelation so visceral that it leaves everyone in a state of horrified delirium. As usual, Alex Horne offers the intrepid contenders moral support

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Opinionated TV viewers share their critiques from April 2017, considering Line of Duty, Mary Berry's Easter Feast, Saturday Night Takeaway, University Challenge, Big Little Lies, The Toilet: An Unspoken History, The Dog with an IQ of 102, and the News

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Unfortunately, his comments are so inappropriate that he is accused of sexual harassment and sent to the university's human resources department, where he ends up dragging Leonard, Raj and Howard into trouble too. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Liza Tarbuck still leads the pack of five comics, as Russell Howard wraps a tie round his head and Tim Vine is left bereft by a small piece of bent metal

programme.title: Batwoman
